findings.summary: USB-C tester (57 components). 18 test pads not detected as test points (gen_testpad lib_id not recognized). UART detector misclassifies USB 3.1 SuperSpeed signals as UART.

incorrect.description: UART detector misclassifies USB 3.1 SuperSpeed signals as UART

missed.description: 18 test pads not detected as test points - gen_testpad library symbol not recognized

suggestions: Recognize gen_testpad library symbols as test points
Do not classify USB SuperSpeed differential pairs as UART
